overview.description: Finance and banking in Vietnam is highly digitalized with strong AI adoption. Key applications include fraud detection, credit scoring, KYC automation, and customer churn prediction. Vietnam has 40+ commercial banks and a rapidly growing fintech ecosystem.
overview.marketSizeVietnam: ~$600B total banking assets; digital banking users exceeded 30M in 2025
overview.marketSizeSEA: ~$4.5T regional banking sector; Singapore, Indonesia, Vietnam as key AI hubs

domainKnowledge.typicalDataVolume: Very high — billions of transactions per month across major banks
domainKnowledge.dataQuality: Medium to high — core banking well-structured but siloed across products

painPoints.problem: Fraud and anomalous transactions are hard to detect in real-time at scale
Manual KYC document verification is slow, error-prone, and expensive
Credit scoring models fail on thin-file customers (young, rural)
Customer churn prediction is reactive rather than proactive

relatedNodes.description: Insurance and banking share risk modeling and fraud detection.
Retail banking and e-commerce payment systems are tightly integrated.
